lines.text: Here on My Jobs you'll see every demand you've posted, each as its own card.
A card shows the job title, what you need, how many units, and the route.
And this bar across the card is the staged gate, the heart of how Nguzo protects you.
Every job moves through fixed stages in order, bidding, award, agreements, inspection, permits, payment, and execution.
Nothing skips ahead. A machine cannot move until it has been inspected, and money is only released when work is signed off.
This is the difference between Nguzo and a simple marketplace, the gate enforces trust, it doesn't just connect you.
So at a glance you always know exactly where your job stands. Now let's post one.
